conservative.name: Impersonate
conservative.requirements: Must have at least passing familiarity with the subject of your imitation

success.description: You change your voice and mannerisms to match that of your subject

bane.description: Your imitation is unkind. If the subject of your imitation observes you "getting in character", he suffers 1 stress and may react very poorly

sigmarsComet.description: Your likeness is uncanny. Gain on any Guile checks when your imitation is an advantage while this card is recharging

reckless.name: Impersonate
reckless.requirements: Must have at least passing familiarity with the subject of your imitation

success.description: You change your voice and mannerisms to match a specific person
As above, but your likeness is uncanny. You gain a instead of a

bane.description: Your imitation is embarrassing. All allies within close range suffer 1 stress

chaosStar.description: "Who are you again?" If the check failed, add on all Guile checks until the end of the Act
